product_overview: Svitlo is a local-first web app for tracking generator runtime sessions and scheduling/recording maintenance across organizations. It provides role-based access, live runtime tracking, maintenance templates, and AI-suggested maintenance plans for administrators.
core_goals: Provide reliable local-first start/stop session logging and live runtime tracking for generators.
Compute generator state (running/resting/available) and surface warnings when run or rest limits are approached.
Allow administrators to create/manage organizations, invite members, assign employees to generators, and configure generators and maintenance templates.
Make maintenance scheduling actionable by computing due/overdue tasks from maintenance records and offering AI-suggested templates.
Support offline-first operation with background synchronization while preserving primary functionality without connectivity.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign up and sign in with email/password (Better Auth). Maintain session persistence and show error messages on invalid credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-in -> Click "Sign Up" tab to switch to registration mode -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click submit button to sign up -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /sign-in -> Click "Sign In" tab to switch to login mode -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click submit button to sign in -> See /dashboard

Navigate to /sign-in -> Click "Sign In" tab to switch to login mode -> Fill email input field with invalid credentials -> Fill password input field -> Click submit button to sign in -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /sign-in -> Sign in with valid credentials -> Refresh browser -> See user still authenticated and /dashboard still accessible

features.name: Organization Management
features.description: Create organizations, manage members and invitations, and switch organization context via the dashboard settings and sidebar.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Create new organization from sidebar -> Fill organization name -> Click save to create organization -> See /dashboard/:organizationId/settings

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/settings -> View organization members list -> Invite member by entering email address -> Click invite to send invitation -> See new pending invitation in InvitationList
Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/settings -> Click cancel pending invitation (admin only) -> Confirm cancellation -> See invitation removed from InvitationList

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/settings -> Click Invite member -> Enter an email address that already has an outstanding invitation -> Click invite -> See error message that invitation already exists

features.name: Generator CRUD
features.description: Create, edit, and configure generators including runtime limits and warning thresholds from the sidebar and generator detail pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click plus button in sidebar to open create generator modal -> Fill generator title, model, and description -> Set max consecutive run hours and required rest hours -> Set runtime warning threshold percentage -> Click save to create generator -> See /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId
Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> Click edit button on generator detail page -> Modify generator fields -> Click save changes -> See updated generator details
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click plus button in sidebar to open create generator modal -> Leave required fields blank -> Click save to create generator -> See validation errors for missing fields

features.name: Runtime Session Tracking
features.description: Start/stop live sessions and log manual past sessions; display live elapsed time, progress against limits, and session history with edit/delete actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> Click play button to start a new session -> See live elapsed time counter while session is running -> See runtime progress bar against max consecutive hours -> Click stop button to end the current session -> See session added to session history with computed duration

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> Click log manual session button -> Enter past start time -> Enter past stop time -> Click save -> See manual session listed in session history with duration

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> See generator status shows resting -> Click play button to start a new session -> See error message preventing session start because generator is resting
Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> In session history select a past session -> Edit start and stop times -> Click save -> See updated duration in session history

features.name: Generator Status Monitoring
features.description: Derive and surface generator state (running/resting/available) with colored indicators, rest countdowns, and attention alerts that navigate to generator details.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId -> See list of assigned generators with status dots in sidebar -> See active session card on dashboard with elapsed time -> Click attention required alert -> See /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId
Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId -> See a generator near its run limit and a warning indicator -> Click the warning indicator -> See generator detail with warning highlighted
Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId -> If session/status data cannot be computed due to sync error -> See error message indicating generator status cannot be determined

features.name: Maintenance Planning and Tracking
features.description: Create maintenance templates (hours/calendar/whichever_first), compute due/overdue from maintenance records, and record maintenance completions with notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> Click Maintenance tab on generator detail page -> Click add maintenance template button -> Enter task name and description -> Select trigger type hours or calendar or whichever_first -> Set trigger interval values -> Toggle one-time vs recurring -> Click save maintenance template -> See template card with due status indicators

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> On a template card click record button to log maintenance completion -> Enter notes -> Click save -> See maintenance record appear in maintenance history and computed next due date update

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> Click add maintenance template button -> Select trigger type that requires interval values but leave interval empty -> Click save -> See validation error about required interval values

features.name: AI Maintenance Suggestions
features.description: Administrator-triggered AI agent generates suggested maintenance templates from generator attributes using web research; suggestions are reviewable and optionally accepted.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click plus button in sidebar to open create generator modal -> Fill in generator model and description -> Click generate suggestions button -> Wait for AI to return maintenance plan suggestions -> Review suggestions -> Click accept on a suggestion to create maintenance template -> See suggested template saved on generator detail
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open create generator modal while device is offline -> See generate suggestions button disabled -> See explanatory message that AI suggestions require internet

features.name: Employee Assignment
features.description: Assign organization members to specific generators for controlled access; administrators manage assignments and unassign with confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> View assigned employees list -> Select member from dropdown to assign (admin only) -> Confirm assignment -> See member appear in assigned employees list

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> Click unassign button for an assigned employee (admin only) -> Confirm unassignment in dialog -> See member removed from assigned employees list
Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId -> Non-admin user attempts to assign a member -> Click assign -> See permission error indicating admin-only action

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Centralized view of active sessions, assigned generators, alerts, and upcoming maintenance prioritized by urgency with quick actions and navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId -> See active session card with elapsed time and stop button -> Click stop on active session card -> See active session removed from active card and session saved to history
Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId -> See upcoming maintenance ranked by urgency -> Click maintenance item -> See /dashboard/:organizationId/generators/:generatorId

Navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId -> Have many generators and no search/filter available -> Attempt to locate a specific generator in list -> Must scroll to find item and see usability limitation message

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Persistent sidebar for org switching, navigation links, generator quick-access, pending invitations, user profile actions, and theme toggle.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Switch organization from dropdown -> See context update and navigate to /dashboard/:organizationId -> Sidebar generator list updates to selected organization
Navigate to /dashboard -> See pending invitations in sidebar -> Click Accept on an invitation -> See membership added and invitation removed from InvitationList
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click user profile -> Click Sign out -> See redirect to /sign-in
Navigate to /dashboard -> See pending invitation in sidebar -> Attempt to accept an invitation that was canceled by admin -> Click Accept -> See error message that invitation no longer exists

tech_stack: PowerSync (local-first SQLite sync), Better Auth, oRPC, Drizzle ORM, Neon PostgreSQL, Zod validation

routes.description: Landing page with features overview and call-to-action to sign in
Combined sign-in and sign-up form with email and password
Dashboard home - redirects to first org or shows welcome prompt
Organization dashboard with active sessions, generators, alerts, upcoming maintenance
Organization settings - name, members, invitations management
Generator detail page with runtime tracking, session history, maintenance plans

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-in and sign-up with session persistence via Better Auth
user_interactions: Click "Sign Up" tab to switch to registration mode
Fill name input field
Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click submit button to sign up
Click "Sign In" tab to switch to login mode
Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click submit button to sign in
See error message on invalid credentials

user_interactions: Create new organization from sidebar
Switch between organizations using dropdown
View organization members list
Invite member by entering email address (admin only)
Cancel pending invitation (admin only)
Remove member from organization (admin only)

user_interactions: Click plus button in sidebar to open create generator modal
Fill generator title, model, and description
Set max consecutive run hours and required rest hours

See runtime progress bar against max consecutive hours

Save maintenance template

Delete template

user_interactions: Fill in generator model in creation modal
Click generate suggestions button
Wait for AI to return maintenance plan suggestions
Review and edit suggested values
Confirm and save generator with suggested maintenance templates

user_interactions: View assigned employees list on generator detail page
Select member from dropdown to assign (admin only)
Click unassign button to remove member (admin only)
Confirm unassignment in dialog

user_interactions: View active session card with elapsed time and stop button
See list of assigned generators with status dots

Click Dashboard or Settings navigation links

known_limitations.issue: No generator deletion feature visible in UI
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot delete generators, only edit them

known_limitations.issue: No search or filter for generators or maintenance tasks
known_limitations.impact: Users with many generators must scroll to find items

known_limitations.issue: No push notifications or email alerts for maintenance due dates
known_limitations.impact: Users must check the dashboard manually for alerts
Organizations cannot be removed once created
